<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# backend/schemas/agent_platform.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T10:00:37Z

## Purpose
Unified agent platform integration schemas.

These models describe the local setup surface for Harness Agent, OpenClaw,
Paperclip, PoliysAI governance, CUA, and Stagehand/Playwright browser
adapters. The API is intentionally explicit about working-local vs dry-run vs
external-not-installed status.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `typing` import Any, Literal
- from `pydantic` import BaseModel, Field, field_validator

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Classes
- `AgentToolStatus`: Runtime/setup status for one agent-platform tool.
- `AgentPlatformStatusResponse`: Aggregated setup/status response for all requested agent tooling.
- `AgentPlatformManifestResponse`: Machine-readable integration manifest for orchestrators and operators.
- `AgentPolicyEvaluationRequest`: Input for evaluating whether an agent/tool action is allowed.
- `AgentPolicyEvaluationResponse`: Policy decision for one agent/tool action.
- `ApprovalBrokerRequest`: Approve/submit/next broker request.
- `ApprovalBrokerResponse`: Approval broker decision plus optional OpenClaw submission result.
- `TypedCouncilRunRequest`: Input for the Pydantic AI typed 3-stage council.
- `TypedCouncilRunResponse`: Normalized typed council result for author/reviewer/chair runs.
- `CuaExecutionRequest`: Policy-gated CUA/browser execution request.
- `CuaExecutionResponse`: Normalized response for a governed CUA/browser action.
- `CuaAuditRow`: One §38.3 audit row read back from data/agent-supervisor/cua_runs.jsonl.
- `CuaAuditListResponse`: Tenant-scoped readback of the CUA audit log.
- `TenantActivityItem`: One row in the unified tenant-activity feed.
- `TenantActivityResponse`: Unified per-tenant activity feed across CUA + admin + Paperclip + OpenClaw.
- `AdminCuaAuditListResponse`: Compliance/auditor cross-tenant readback of the CUA audit log.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Outcome-specific (executed):
- Outcome-specific (blocked):
- Outcome-specific (error):
- Outcome-specific (CUA executed)
